utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each one is fully specified: health_coverage includes physical and mental health with associated costs and adds details like preventive care and addons; property_coverage lists home/contents insurance with costs; travel_coverage lists travel insurance with costs; additional_services lists enhancement services with costs or notes on inclusion; total_budget provides a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items required in the format are included and fully specified.

To map these to the ground-truth ratings, we identify which available plans in the dataset correspond to each coverage component by matching cost and type. For physical health (€200/month), the only matching plan is PrimeCare Premium Plan (rating 10). For mental health (€65/month), the matching plan is LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8). For travel coverage, 'international_family' (€55/month) aligns with TravelFirst Standard Plan (€55, rating 8), and 'business_travel' (€35/month) aligns most closely with MedSecure Basic Plan (€40, rating 3) among travel plans. The 'concierge_services' add-on corresponds to Concierge Services (rating 7) under travel_enhancement_services. The '24_7_support' and 'global_assistance' inclusions likely represent Premium Medical Network (already included) and 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 9). Therefore, the mapped ratings are as follows.
